1.title: CPU Management Plane Utilization
1.query:
timeseries utilization = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.palo-alto.generic.cpu.management.utilization),
  by: { dt.entity.palo-alto:device }
| fieldsAdd palo-alto:device_name = entityName(dt.entity.palo-alto:device)
| sort arrayAvg(utilization) desc
| limit 20

2.title: CPU System Plane Utilization
2.query:
timeseries utilization = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.palo-alto.generic.cpu.system.utilization),
  by: { dt.entity.palo-alto:device }
| fieldsAdd palo-alto:device_name = entityName(dt.entity.palo-alto:device)
| sort arrayAvg(utilization) desc
| limit 20

3.title: com.dynatrace.extension.palo-alto.generic.device.entity
3.query:
timeseries entity = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.palo-alto.generic.device.entity),
  by: { dt.entity.network:device }
| fieldsAdd network:device_name = entityName(dt.entity.network:device)
| sort arrayAvg(entity) desc
| limit 20
